evidence_snippets: ASUS FAQ 1030642 documents Rescue Mode for ASUS routers using RT-AC68U as an example: set static IP 192.168.1.10/24, hold Reset while powering on, slow flashing power LED indicates Rescue Mode, upload firmware with Firmware Restoration, wait around 1 minute, steady power light indicates completion, then wait for reboot and restore TCP/IPv4 automatic settings.
collector_notes: Official ASUS Rescue Mode evidence using RT-AC68U as an example. No profile generation is allowed without model-level evidence and reviewer approval.
